chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1562 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No. 6142/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.6143/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 15.09.2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner intends to approach the concerned department first for appropriate relief; as such, he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
